This beautiful 3 bedroom, 2 bathroom home of 1,861 sq ft awaits on a nice quiet street in the desirable south Tampa school district perfect for families or first-time home buyers. Upon entering the home you will be impressed with the spacious feel, multiple living areas, plenty of natural light. Just off the living room is a formal dining area. The kitchen is perfect for the family chef and features plenty of cabinets, counter space and a breakfast area overlooking the lush backyard oasis. This home has two master bedrooms one on the first floor and a dedicated entire second floor as well. Beautiful ceiling to floor windows cover the entire back of the house with incredible views of the backyard. The lush backyard landscaping provides a secret garden feel for romantic entertaining or peaceful relaxing with a book. Don’t miss this opportunity to be on one of the nicest streets in the South Tampa school
